item.title: F-028: AI — Smart Completions (Local AI)
item.intent: Context-aware autocomplete should understand markdown structure — suggest table layouts, list continuations, and patterns, not just words
item.description: Completes markdown structures: table header suggests column layout, list suggests next items based on pattern. Completes front matter patterns if present (read-only per DP-6). Ghost text, Tab to accept. On-device, works offline. Same device floor as F-025: iPhone 15 / M1 Mac minimum.
acceptanceCriteria: User types table header row and presses Enter — AI suggests separator row and first data row
User Tabs to accept ghost text suggestion
Works offline on supported devices, not available on older devices
